lines.content: - [x] Verify live `git-kb init git --help` and generated output before changing git hooks.
- [x] Verify there is no required `git-kb hook` command before generating any assistant hook that calls it.
- [x] Define how `context_injection`, `auto_commit_link`, `auto_worktree_bind`, `auto_progress`, and `prompt_context` map to Claude/Codex behavior.
- [ ] Add validation that fails when generated assistant hooks call missing commands.
- [ ] Add validation that stale trusted hook state is reported before mutation.
- [x] Add validation that fails when generated assistant hooks call missing commands.
- [x] Add validation that stale trusted hook state is reported before mutation.
- [x] Destructive hook cleanup requires backup and exact path match.
# Policy
- `.kb/config.toml [hooks]` is policy input only. Missing hook keys are not permission to invent assistant hooks.
- `context_injection` and `prompt_context` map to context loading/injection behavior, not shell cleanup.
- `auto_commit_link`, `auto_worktree_bind`, and `auto_progress` map to explicit GitKB workflow actions only after live command proof and user-approved adapter generation.
- Generated assistant hooks must not call nonexistent commands. Validation for this rule still needs implementation.
- Generated assistant hooks must not call nonexistent commands. `meta plugin doctor-hooks` validates this rule against assistant hook JSON surfaces.
- Destructive hook cleanup requires backup, exact path match, and explicit approval.
# Progress Evidence
- 2026-07-02 rerun: `git-kb init git hooks` installed the GitKB `reference-transaction` hook into all 14 child repos.
- 2026-07-02 rerun: a follow-up `git-kb init git hooks --dry-run` reported 0 would be modified, 14 already installed, 0 errors.
- 2026-07-02: `/home/flexnetos/.codex/config.toml` still contains trusted hook state entries for other FlexNetOS paths; this task did not mutate or clean them.
- 2026-07-02: Implemented `meta plugin doctor-hooks` in `meta_cli` commit `2b5d64e` and documented it in root commit `e737afc`.

- Missing-command validation proof: `cargo test -p meta hook_policy --locked -- --test-threads=1` passed 2 focused tests, including a fixture where `git-kb hook stop` is reported as unsupported because `git-kb hook` is not a live command.

- Live validation proof: `meta plugin doctor-hooks --json` exited 0, scanned `.claude/settings.json`, `claude-plugin/hooks/hooks.json`, and `codex-plugins/plugins/gitkb/hooks/hooks.json`, and reported `"missing_command_issues": []`.

- Trusted-state proof: the same `meta plugin doctor-hooks --json` run reported 24 `external_workspace` trusted hook-state entries from `/home/flexnetos/.codex/config.toml`; no trust state was mutated.

- Code-intelligence proof: `git-kb code index meta_cli/src/main.rs meta_cli/src/hook_policy.rs --force --index-only` indexed 74 symbols from the 2 changed files; `git-kb code symbols --path '*hook_policy*' --json` reported `HookPolicyReport`, `scan_hook_policy`, `validate_hook_command`, and `scan_codex_trusted_state`.
- Diff proof: `git -C meta_cli diff --check -- src/main.rs src/hook_policy.rs` and `git diff --check -- docs/agent_plugin_control_plane.md docs/architecture/automation-boundaries.md` both passed.
# Progress Log
# Progress Log
- Ran the live GitKB git hook initializer instead of only documenting it; all 14 child repo `reference-transaction` hooks are now installed. Assistant hook validation criteria remain open.
- Recorded hook policy and live command proof; left missing-command/stale-trust validation implementation criteria open.
- Added `meta plugin doctor-hooks` to validate assistant hook commands and report external/missing trusted Codex hook state before mutation.
- Ran the live GitKB git hook initializer instead of only documenting it; all 14 child repo `reference-transaction` hooks are now installed.
- Recorded hook policy and live command proof; no destructive hook cleanup or trust-state mutation was performed.

changes.title: Model GitKB hook toggles as meta-plugin policy
